reviews.review_title: A GREAT RETRO PLATFORMER IN VR
reviews.review_description:
Jump World captures the magic of classic platform games and brings it into VR with impressive results. The controls are easy to learn, the levels are packed with secrets and collectibles, and the progression keeps you coming back for one more run.

The colorful worlds, hidden areas and challenging dungeons create a fun adventure suitable for both casual and experienced players. A charming VR platformer with plenty of content and personality.

reviews.review_title: THE BEST PURCHASE I'VE MADE ON META!
reviews.review_description: As a huge fan of a certain Italian plumber, this is my new favorite VR game! It puts you right in the First Person perspective of a character who has White gloves, runs, jumps, breaks bricks and stomps on enemies! What has been crafted here is a love letter to platformers times passed, combined with a little bit of Fall Guys for good added measure! Stages are linear (with the exception of the Overworld Map) and the formula works quite well! There are collectibles in the form of Stars and Coins. What follows is an amazing start to what hopefully becomes a more fully fleshed out franchise. I would love to see this series branch out in the future to a more Open World formula, wherein instead of a bunch of linear stages where you go for speed in each world, each world is converted into a huge map like that of the Overworld in the first game you have here! Stars could be used much like they were on a certain 64-Bit console, and you could perhaps add more Powerups to help traverse said Open World Sandbox stage. That being said, what you have here is quite amazing already! Just figured I would give my Feedback and let the Developer know what creative and inventive ways they might be able to rehash or reuse this engine and make an even more amazing Title moving forward! Perhaps they could even implement such an idea as DLC in the future. I'd buy that in a heartbeat!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the awesome review! We're glad that you enjoyed the game. We completely agree that we would like to branch out more into an open world style game in the future.  At first we didn't know what was possible, but as we continued with development we discovered how much fun it was just to run around the overworld area. We'll definitely expand the world more. Thanks for all the feedback!
